name: Jake
review: Bro, this Narcoleptic NEIPA is something else. Like, total fruit bomb in a can. Can't believe it's from Suffolk!

name: Margaret
review: What a delightful brew this Narcoleptic NEIPA is! A lovely balance of tropical fruits, though perhaps a tad strong for my taste. Still, I do certainly recommend it.

name: Tom
review: The Narcoleptic NEIPA showcases an impressive hop profile with heavy doses of Citra and Mosaic, resulting in a hazy mouthfeel laced with mango and peach esters. A hefty DIPA at 8.4% ABV that does not shy away from its strength—definitely a banger!

name: Colin
review: Not bad but a bit too strong for my liking. I prefer something a bit lighter. It's got nice fruity notes, though.

name: Sophie
review: Absolutely banging! Had it on a recommendation and it did not disappoint. Perfect for a cold night, just what I needed!

name: Harry
review: Came all the way from Clapham just to try this NEIPA. Very fruity with that delightful haze. Only thing is, wish it came in a bigger glass!

name: Emily
review: This NEIPA boasts an impressive IBU profile, perfectly balancing the tropical notes with a soft mouthfeel. The finish is a fruit-forward explosion. Can't get over how good this is!

name: David
review: I expected more from this NEIPA. Too hoppy for my taste and slightly overwhelming. Probably won’t order again.

name: Laura
review: Such a unique beer! The tropical flavors really come through, and it has just the right amount of bitterness. I’ll be dreaming of this one!

name: Michael
review: Nice complexity with an alluring aroma. The 8.4% ABV is well-integrated; it masks the strength well, resulting in an incredibly smooth drinking experience. Solid job!

name: Zoe
review: Delicious and fruity! I enjoyed the NEIPA, but I did find it a bit too sweet towards the end. Overall, a great experience at the brewery.

name: Emma
review: BEST BEER EVER! I want to order a whole crate just for myself. It’s like a party in my mouth!

name: Robert
review: Had this at the pub and it was awful. Too much tropical, not enough balance. What a letdown.

name: Sarah
review: Wow, this is a masterpiece! Just the right amount of bitterness with those tropical notes. I’m definitely a fan now, can’t wait to spread the word.

name: Dan
review: Really good NEIPA. Fruity, hoppy, and goes down smooth. Kinda wish it had a bit more body, though.

name: James
review: An exceptional example of a NEIPA. The hop blend is undoubtedly well thought out, providing depth and layers of aroma. The 8.4% ABV sneaks up on you—consume responsibly!

name: Olivia
review: In love with this beer! The NEIPA is so fruity and pleasant. Can't believe it’s so strong! Definitely coming back.

name: Harv
review: This is the best NEIPA I've ever had! It’s like drinking sunshine. Hats off to the brewers!

name: Ben
review: Sadly underwhelming. The flavors didn’t really hit me like I expected. Maybe a bad batch?

name: Pete
review: A solid NEIPA. Tropical taste with a nice bitter finish. Enjoyed it quite a bit. Will try other beers here next time!

name: Lucy
review: OMG this beer is the best! I could drink it every day. So fruity and smooth. It made my day!

name: Matt
review: The hazy appearance signals the dense hop aroma to come, and it does not disappoint. A well-balanced DIPA with a creamy mouthfeel. Easily one of the top craft beers I've had!

name: Barbara
review: It is certainly interesting, but too strong for my palate. I prefer lighter ales, such as a nice golden ale.

name: Tommy
review: Thoroughly enjoyed this NEIPA. Great tropical flavours with a lingering finish. Perfect for summer!

name: Alice
review: Like, wow! The fruit notes are rich and tasty—definitely a must-try for anyone in the area!

name: Graham
review: BEST BEER. Also Graham's 10k PB is 52:14 apparently. He told me three times. Seriously though, this NEIPA is fantastic!

name: Claire
review: Just amazing! Hazy, tropical, slightly sticky finish. Hard to believe this gem is brewed in Suffolk!

name: Angus
review: It’s okay. Not my favourite, but I appreciate the effort. Just didn’t do it for me personally.

name: Daniel
review: Easily one of the best NEIPAs I've experienced. The use of Galaxy hops enhances the tropical notes perfectly. A marvel of small-batch brewing!

name: Leo
review: This NEIPA is really nice and refreshing! I liked the strong fruity aroma. Would recommend to others for sure.

name: Hannah
review: Absolutely loved the Narcoleptic NEIPA! It's creamy and packed with fruity goodness. Can’t wait to come back for more!

name: Charlotte
review: A stunning NEIPA with a perfect blend of tropical and resinous hops. The soft mouthfeel is inviting—genuinely an exceptional craft beer!

name: Mark
review: Not a fan. The flavors were too strong and it just didn't sit right with me. Won't be having it again.

name: Samantha
review: Very good NEIPA! I loved the fruity notes, but it could use a bit more bitterness for my liking. Overall, great brew!

name: Gary
review: This was a solid NEIPA, quite fruity with a nice soft feel. Enjoyed it more than I thought I would!

name: Simon
review: Had this at the brewery and it blew my mind! The fruitiness is off the charts, and it was so smooth. Can’t recommend it enough!

name: Jasmine
review: I’m not even kidding, this NEIPA is my new obsession! Perfectly fruity and strong. Totally worth the drive!

name: Felicity
review: Really not a fan of this. Overly sweet and not balanced at all. Can't understand the hype.

name: Jake
review: Good stuff! Very fruity and smooth. Had it at the brewery's launch and loved it!

name: Paula
review: Really enjoyed this NEIPA! Smooth, fruity, and great for sipping on a sunny day. Would recommend!

name: Nicholas
review: It was good, but just not exceptional, you know? I expected a lot more based on the hype around it.

name: Tiffany
review: Disappointing, unfortunately. The flavour was just too much for me—would rather have a lager.

name: Chloe
review: Absolutely fantastic! This NEIPA is an experience. So full of flavor and wonderfully strong. I love it!

name: Martin
review: Really nice NEIPA! The tropical notes were perfect and it was quite smooth. Definitely worth trying!

name: Susan
review: Did not enjoy this. Overhyped and overly sweet. I’d rather stick to my usual drinks.

name: Angelica
review: This beer is just incredible! Fruity, hazy, and a bit dreamy. I could drink this forever!

name: Liam
review: It’s alright, but didn’t live up to expectations. Not bad, but not great either.

name: Norman
review: A rather delightful beverage, I must say. Well-crafted with distinct fruit flavors that are pleasant on the palate.

name: Gina
review: This NEIPA is a revelation! The best part of my trip to Suffolk. I can't wait to return for more!

name: Sarah
review: Sorry to say, but this one didn’t do it for me. Too much fruit and not enough balance.

name: Tom
review: This NEIPA is incredible! So smooth and fruity, I could drink it all day. The tropical aromas are just stunning! Definitely coming back for more!

name: Olivia
review: Really enjoyed this beer! The mango and peach hints are lovely. Just a bit strong for my taste. Will order again!

name: Ben
review: I was really looking forward to it but got something completely different. 1 star because it was Browny who served me. Very disappointing.

name: Emma
review: Absolutely brilliant NEIPA! It's a real tropical bomb, and I just love the finish. Perfect for summer days!

name: Graham
review: Visited just to try the Narcoleptic NEIPA and wow, it did not disappoint! A lovely haze and explosion of fruit! Graham told me about his 10k PB too, which was a bonus. Highly recommend!

name: Janet
review: Very good NEIPA, smooth and hazy. Just a tad strong for me, may stick with the lighter ones. Still, a very enjoyable drink!

name: David
review: Wasn't a fan, too strong and the tropical flavours were overwhelming. Maybe it's just not for me. Sorry!

name: Lucy
review: Superb NEIPA! Creamy mouthfeel with all those delicious fruit notes. Truly a tropical delight! Will be back for sure!

name: Michael
review: Great NEIPA with a lovely balance of flavours. The mouthfeel is soft and easy-drinking. Perfect for a hot day!

name: James
review: Wow! This is the best NEIPA I’ve ever tasted! Full of juicy mango and peach. Graham's 10k time is still stuck in my head though! Will visit again soon!

name: Sarah
review: Not bad, but I expected more. It was alright but didn't quite live up to the hype. Maybe I’ll try a different one next time.

name: Josh
review: Perfect NEIPA! Seriously one of the best brews I’ve had! Huge tropical fruit burst and a soft finish. I’m in love!

name: Harriet
review: Disappointing. Very strong and overpowering. I expected something lighter. I’ll stick to the pale ales!

name: Robert
review: Nice NEIPA, lovely tropical aroma, but maybe a bit too heavy for my taste. Overall, a solid choice!

name: Zoe
review: This has quickly become my go-to beer! Truly mouthwatering with all those fruity notes. I highly recommend it to everyone!

name: Michael
review: What an experience! The NEIPA was fantastic, and Graham’s passion is contagious! Will definitely recommend to my mates!

name: Dan
review: It was decent, but I was expecting something more unique. Just average to me. Good story at least!

name: Sophie
review: Love the fruitiness of this NEIPA, such a treat! I could drink a few of these while sitting by the beach. Very nice!

name: Emma
review: Absolutely loved it! The blend of tropical fruits just hits the right spot. Great job Belly Pork!

name: Matt
review: Couldn’t finish it. Too strong for my taste and the fruitiness was too much. Not my cup of tea. Will not get this again.

name: Amy
review: Wow, just wow! Such a strong NEIPA with stunning flavors. Graham's stories are just as good as the beer!

name: Tom
review: Lovely NEIPA. Good balance of flavors. I enjoyed the tropical notes but it's not my usual pick. Strong overall!

name: Lucy
review: Hands down the best NEIPA I’ve had! It’s just so juicy and smooth. Perfect for any occasion!

name: Jake
review: This NEIPA is unreal! The tropical punch is phenomenal and the mouthfeel is like silk. Can't recommend it enough!

name: Barbara
review: A very nice NEIPA. Huge notes of fruit but it was a bit too sweet for my liking. Still, I would drink it again!

name: Colin
review: It's alright. I expected a bit more depth with flavours. Just okay for me. Might try the Reverse Weave next!

name: Harv
review: Too strong, didn't enjoy it much. I like my beers lighter. Sorry to say, not for me!

name: Sarah
review: This is my favorite beer of all time! So fruity and refreshing. I can drink it every day! Will always recommend!

name: Matt
review: Nicely balanced with fruity aroma. Not overly bitter, which I liked. Felt great drinking it! Would visit again!

name: Mike
review: Best NEIPA I’ve ever had! Seriously, everything about it is perfection! A must-try for any beer lover!

name: Daniel
review: Not bad, but didn’t live up to expectations. It was good, but I prefer a bit more bitterness in my IPAs. Middle of the road for me.

name: Barney
review: The name is spot on! After a couple of these, I’m ready for a nap! So fruity and heavenly. My new go-to!

name: Emma
review: Solid NEIPA! Really enjoyed the tropical aroma. Just a little bit too strong for my liking but still very nice!

name: David
review: Not impressed. Too overpowering and harsh. Definitely not my favorite style of beer. I stick to pale ales instead.

name: James
review: One of the best NEIPAs I've had the pleasure to enjoy! Fantastic tropical notes and smooth finish. Really well done!

name: Sophie
review: Was blown away by the depth of flavors! Perfectly balanced and highly enjoyable. Can't wait to get another!

name: Tom
review: It was good but not great. A bit too sweet for my palate. I like my beers more balanced. Might try something else next time!

name: Matthew
review: Nice flavor profile! Strong fruity notes, and a good mouthfeel. I’ll definitely recommend this to my friends!

name: Lucy
review: Love, love, love this NEIPA! The juicy flavors mixed with the smoothness make it the perfect beer. Can’t get enough!

name: Chris
review: A bit too fruity for my taste. Didn’t enjoy the sweetness. I think I’ll just stick to traditional IPAs. Disappointed!

name: Matt
review: One of the best craft beers I’ve had this year! Super juicy with lots of flavor. It’s simply fantastic!

name: Amy
review: A very tasty NEIPA but a bit heavy for me. Still, it has a great taste and aroma! Will definitely try it again!

name: Daniel
review: It was alright, but I would prefer something with more hops. Didn’t live up to my expectations unfortunately.

name: Harriet
review: Absolute delight! This NEIPA is heaven in a glass! Great fruity kick and perfect smoothness! Highly recommend!

name: Graham
review: A solid NEIPA, very tasty. Loved the tropical notes! Graham’s passion for running was a fun story too! Will return soon!

name: Robert
review: Phenomenal NEIPA! Rich flavors and smooth as silk. Best I've had in ages! Belly Pork has nailed it!

name: Jake
review: Incredible NEIPA! Full of tropical flavors and an amazing mouthfeel. Can’t recommend this enough to all my friends!

name: Lucy
review: Very enjoyable NEIPA! Fruity and fresh, but I felt it had a bit too much sweetness. Overall, a great experience!

name: Chris
review: It was decent, but not amazing. The flavors were quite nice, but didn't quite hit the mark. I prefer other styles usually.

name: Sarah
review: This NEIPA is a game changer! So refreshing and fruity. I’m in love with this brew! Belly Pork has knocked it out of the park!

name: David
review: Absolutely one of the best IPAs I've ever had! Tropical notes just explode from the aroma. The name couldn't be more fitting—had a couple pints and woke up on the sofa!

name: Sophia
review: Gorgeous hazy orange and super tropical! This is definitely one to sip at home, I may have fallen asleep on the couch after! Will be back to try more.

name: Colin
review: Just fantastic! Hazy and juicy with a perfect mouthfeel. Graham was there and his passion made it even better!

name: Lucy
review: It was okay but honestly too strong for me. I think I overestimated my tolerance, barely finished it. Expected more fruity flavors. Disappointed.

name: James
review: An absolute banger! The tropical notes really come through, and yes, it knocked me out! Plan to spend a lazy Sunday recovering post-tasting. 10/10 would recommend!

name: Zoe
review: WOW—what a beer! Total flavor explosion with that juicy mouthfeel! Had a couple and fell asleep watching Netflix! Definitely returning for more!

name: Emma
review: Really enjoyable! Didn't find it overly heavy, but be careful—will sneak up on you! I recommend having it with a nice curry!

name: Harv
review: The name says it all! Knocks you out in the best way! Crazy aroma and flavor profile; tropical fruit heaven! Count me in every time!

name: Matthew
review: I love this NEIPA! Soft and hazy, the flavors are bright without overwhelming. And yes—I did doze off for a bit after a few!

name: Barbara
review: Very tasty but be aware of the ABV! Went for a second round, and it definitely sat heavier. A solid addition to the local craft scene!

name: Tom
review: Honestly, not for me. I would have preferred a lighter beer. It knocked me out as promised, but wasn’t enjoyable at all. Just too strong!

name: Sarah
review: Fantastic NEIPA! It’s got that juicy, tropical goodness down to a science. Couldn't resist grabbing a few cans for home!

name: Daniel
review: Pretty solid stuff! Pineapple and peach in the aroma, great mouthfeel. Just watch the strength, I was out for the night!

name: Janet
review: An interesting take on a NEIPA but I didn’t like it as much as I hoped. The strong flavor was overwhelming at times. Worth a try though!

name: Ben
review: Two pints of this and I was flat out on the couch! Delicious tropical fruit flavor! Keep making this one, please!

name: Michael
review: Great stuff! Poured perfectly, lovely color, and the taste is mellow yet full of life. Graham had interesting stories while serving!

name: Jess
review: Not for me. Tried it due to the hype, but found it very heavy and not the tropical experience I was looking for. Disappointed overall.

name: Josh
review: Best NEIPA I’ve had! So many flavors packed in. It’s true, I had to take a nap after! Can’t recommend this enough!

name: Olivia
review: Total knockout! Tropical and smooth, with a little bite at the end. I loved every sip—will definitely make the trip back for this one!

name: Robert
review: I wanted to love it, but it’s just too much for my palate. A bit overwhelming if you’re not used to strong hops. Nice buzz though!

name: Graham
review: Dare I say, this is my new favorite! Incredible aroma, taste, and the name is just so apt—be careful, I was out cold after a few!

name: Sophie
review: Really nice! Fruity and smooth, but very strong. I liked it a lot, but could feel the kick! Perfect for a weekend treat!

name: Michael
review: This NEIPA offers a delightful hazy finish! The flavor is packed with juicy goodness but be warned—the ABV isn’t playing around!

name: Dan
review: Belly Pork has hit a home run with this one! Love the mouthfeel and the punchy hop character! And yes, it put me down for the night!

name: Barbara
review: Just didn’t hit the spot for me. Too heavy and I couldn’t pick out the flavors everyone raves about. Not my thing.

name: Alice
review: A real treat! The fruitiness is incredible; can really taste that mango! Just need to watch yourself with the ABV, had to nap after!

name: Keith
review: Amazing beer! The tropical notes really shine through, and Graham’s banter made it a top-notch experience! Woke up happily on my sofa!

name: Liam
review: Solid NEIPA! The mouthfeel was exceptional; I really liked the sweetness of the fruitiness! I’ll be back for sure!

name: Janet
review: Not bad, just not what I was expecting. The flavor is unique but a bit too bold for my taste. Still, worth trying!

name: Amy
review: This is probably the best beer I’ve ever had! It’s juicy and so drinkable despite the strength. Could easily sip on these all day!

name: Neil
review: Incredible beer! Perfect for lazy afternoons. Be careful—it definitely knocked me out after a couple! But worth every sip!

name: Emma
review: Charming place with great vibes! The NEIPA was fantastic; full of flavor but slightly strong! A little goes a long way!

name: Ben
review: Lovely beer! Tropical flavors are fantastic, and it’s super hazy! Did knock me out a bit though—so pace yourself!

name: Lucy
review: Best beer ever! It’s like a tropical holiday in a glass! Definitely watch out for the ABV—it knocked me flat!

name: Graham
review: Such a glorious NEIPA! I’ve shared it with friends and everyone loves it! Strong but perfectly balanced! 10/10!

name: Oliver
review: Pretty hyped up—in my opinion, it was decent but not the game changer I was expecting. Background notes were too subtle for me.

name: Sarah
review: Hands down my favorite NEIPA! Super tropical and juicy. Discovered it last month, and now I’m a regular!

name: Stephen
review: Awful experience. I enjoy craft beer but this one was just a mess. Way too strong, flavors were a blur. Never again.

name: Liz
review: Great NEIPA! Could really taste the fruitiness. A bit strong for my taste, but definitely enjoyed it. Will come back soon!

name: Tom
review: This is it! The best craft beer I’ve had. Great rich flavors and it definitely gave me a nap after. Fantastic stuff!

name: Harriet
review: It was okay but didn’t live up to the hype. It’s a strong one. Not my go-to beer, but still decent. Would try another from Belly Pork.

name: Emily
review: This is a fantastic beer! The flavor is rich and complex, but it definitely knocks you out, so enjoy responsibly!

name: Darren
review: Unimpressed. I expected more from this NEIPA with how everyone raves about it. I found it too strong and a bit muddled in flavor. Sorry!

name: Chris
review: Absolutely stunning! The layers of flavor are just brilliant. It does put you out but what a ride! Will definitely be back!

name: Jamie
review: Good NEIPA! Fruity and hazy! The only downside was the strength. I experienced a bit of a nap afterwards! All worth it though!

name: Lisa
review: Best craft beer I’ve ever had! Strong but so smooth and delicious! The tropical flavor is spot on. Perfect for summer nights!

name: Oliver
review: Not really my style—very heavy and sharp flavors, I prefer something lighter. Nice try, but I’ll stick to lighter IPAs.

name: Rachael
review: Such an enjoyable beer! The tropical notes are phenomenal. I accidentally fell asleep after a few! Will be back for that classic!

name: Steve
review: Great beer with a punch! The tropical flavors are ripe and bold, but it is strong—definitely need to pace yourself!

name: Megan
review: Absolutely loved this! The perfect amount of fruitiness. I can’t get over how smooth it is too. Definitely a fan!

name: Tom
review: I’ve been coming here since day one, and the Narcoleptic NEIPA is seriously top-notch! The tropical flavors just explode in your mouth! No hangover either. Highly recommend!

name: Lucy
review: Best NEIPA I’ve tried in ages! Hazy, juicy, and super smooth. Ideal for a sunny afternoon! Graham was in fine form, told me about his 10k time!

name: Michael
review: Really loved this NEIPA. Great mouthfeel and aroma. I would’ve given it a 5, but I found it a tad sweet for my taste. Still will be back for more!

name: Ben
review: While impressive, I felt the NEIPA lacked the depth I’ve found in other top contenders. The hop profile centered too much on tropical notes without enough complexity. A decent effort, but not quite at the level of the best NEIPAs nationally.

name: Sophie
review: Absolutely banging NEIPA! The tropical aroma is insane! So happy I made the trip from London just to try it!

name: Emma
review: This is hands down the best beer in Suffolk! The Narcoleptic NEIPA has such a soft mouthfeel. You could drink these all day!

name: David
review: A fantastic surprise! The first sip hits you with a punch of fruitiness. Very enjoyable. Would love to have it again!

name: Jordan
review: Disappointing. The haze was nice but the flavors didn’t translate. Too much bitterness for a NEIPA. I expected more. Definitely not my favorite.

name: Harriet
review: What a tropical delight! The flavor combinations are just heavenly! I want to keep drinking it forever!

name: Jake
review: Sipped this while chilling with friends, and wow! So smooth, and the fruity aromas really pop! Graham's chat was a great bonus!

name: Sarah
review: Very good NEIPA! Incredibly smooth and drinkable. Only problem was it felt a bit heavy after a couple of pints. Still, I’d drink it again!

name: Andrew
review: Good, but not groundbreaking. It has the classic tropical notes, but lacks some of the haze and juicy punch I expect from a top-tier NEIPA. Solid, but not memorable.

name: Colin
review: This is the best batch of NEIPA yet! Massive fruit aroma, perfect balance of sweetness and bitterness. Well done Belly Pork!

name: Zoe
review: Unreal beer! The Narcoleptic NEIPA is everything I wanted and more! Already planning my next trip back!

name: Matt
review: Top-notch NEIPA! It's hazy like it should be and has a lovely, creamy mouthfeel. Would definitely recommend it to my mates!

name: Robert
review: Honestly underwhelmed. The flavor was too subdued for an NEIPA. Expected a lot more based on the hype.

name: Margaret
review: A lovely little brewery with fantastic beers! The Narcoleptic NEIPA was rich and fragrant. I felt spoiled drinking it, such a treat!

name: Amy
review: Great NEIPA, just what I needed after a long day! Smooth with a tropical punch. Would have loved a bit more fruitiness, but still very tasty!

name: Jake
review: Browny served me the wrong beer and charged me for this one. Complete chaos. Unimpressed and won't be coming back.

name: Olivia
review: This beer is everything! The tropical notes are just magnificent. I can’t get enough. Belly Pork is the best!

name: Dan
review: Very good! Quite strong but super tasty. The aroma alone makes me always come back for more. Love the atmosphere at the brewery too!

name: Josh
review: Came for this NEIPA after hearing so much hype! It definitely lives up to the name. Perfect balance of fruitiness and body. 10/10!

name: Barbara
review: Very enjoyable NEIPA! The citrus notes were lovely. A bit on the strong side, but that’s what you want from a DIPA!

name: James
review: Not bad, but lacked the complexity I was hoping for. It’s an okay NEIPA, but I expected something extra given the reputation.

name: Jake
review: Oh my days! This is by far the best NEIPA I’ve had in a long time! It’s fruity and delicious! Graeme probably told me about his running time!

name: Susan
review: What a lovely experience! The ambience is delightful and the beer is just perfection. I’ll be back for more Narcoleptic!

name: Tom
review: Tried the Narcoleptic NEIPA today and while it poured beautifully, the taste just fell flat for me. I had higher expectations based on its reputation.

name: Harv
review: Belly Pork has done it again! The Narcoleptic NEIPA is so delightful with its tropical aromatics. Perfect for a pint or two!

name: Michael
review: A complete letdown. The beer tasted stale and lacked the promised flavors. Disappointed after reading so many good reviews.

name: Lucy
review: Really nice NEIPA! I enjoyed the balance between bitterness and the tropical flavours. It’s got a hefty kick too!

name: Colin
review: What a gem! The Narcoleptic NEIPA is a masterpiece! I appreciate the craftsmanship in every pint.

name: Ben
review: Good attempt, but it didn’t quite hang with the heavyweights in the craft NEIPA scene. Not enough hop complexity despite its hefty ABV.

name: Danielle
review: Very smooth but still bold in flavor! The Narcoleptic NEIPA was a real crowd-pleaser at our last gathering!

name: Sophie
review: The best beer I've tasted this year! Hazy and delicious. Belly Pork is doing something special. Can’t wait to try their next one!

name: Robert
review:
Great NEIPA! Lovely tropical notes but could use a touch more balance. Still very nice! 
 Cheers!

name: Jake
review: A drinkable NEIPA but a bit of a letdown considering its reputation. Lacks the full-bodied experience I was hoping for.  Not a bad beer overall.

name: Harriet
review: Wow! This NEIPA is absolutely fantastic! It’s like drinking a tropical paradise! Can’t recommend it enough!

name: Matt
review: Very nice beer, refreshing and tropical. Would have given it a 5 if it had a bit more hop punch. Overall, a good one!

name: Andrew
review: Sadly not impressed. It lacked the boldness I usually enjoy from an NEIPA. I've had better from other breweries.

name: Colin
review: Another incredible batch of Narcoleptic NEIPA! Perfectly balanced and just divine! Can't recommend it enough!

name: Pete
review: The Narcoleptic NEIPA continues to be a standout! Each sip is an adventure through tropical goodness. A must-try for any craft beer lover!

name: Sarah
review: It was good, but not as strong as I expected. A solid NEIPA, but I've definitely had ones that impressed me more. Worth a try if you're around.

name: Tom
review: Soooooo good! The flavors are perfectly blended and super refreshing! I’m addicted to this NEIPA!

name: Emma
review: Wow! Just wow! This NEIPA is a game changer! Lovely tropical notes and so drinkable! Belly Pork is winning my heart!

name: Jake
review: Really enjoyed this NEIPA! It's bold and smooth. Would be perfect if it had a touch more fruitiness. Definitely worth the trip!

name: Harv
review: Simply the best! I drink a lot of NEIPAs, and this one stands at the top of the list! It’s everything you need and more!

name: Robert
review: Very good! Tropical and hazy. Little bit strong but hey, that's what you want! Would happily recommend it!

name: David
review: Good beer but it didn’t quite meet my expectations. It lacked the complexity I’ve found in other NEIPAs. Wouldn’t rush back for it.

name: Susan
review: A perfect beer for any occasion! The Narcoleptic NEIPA is just right! Impressive flavors and aroma! I’ll be coming back often!

name: Josh
review: Browny! I ordered this NEIPA and got something completely different! What a mess! Never coming back after that.
